name: She's Birdie 130dB Personal Alarm
whyItMatters: Pull-pin keychain siren + LED strobe. Disorients an attacker, alerts everyone in 50 metres.

name: Addalock Portable Door Lock
whyItMatters: Locks any inward-swinging hostel/hotel door from inside even if the front-desk key is duplicated.

name: GE Door Stop Alarm (or eBoot 3-pack)
whyItMatters: Wedge-style stopper with built-in 120dB alarm. Backup if the Addalock fails or you forget it.

name: Pacsafe Citysafe CX Anti-Theft Crossbody
whyItMatters: Slash-resistant body, lockable zippers, RFID-blocking pockets. Pickpocket-proof for crowded markets.

name: Apple AirTag (4-pack) or Samsung SmartTag2
whyItMatters: Drop one in luggage, one in handbag, one in hostel room. Find My / SmartThings tells you where they are.

name: Mi / Anker 10,000 mAh Power Bank
whyItMatters: Phone dies = stranded with no Uber, no maps, no SOS. 10,000 mAh = 3 phone charges minimum.

name: Zoppen RFID-Blocking Travel Wallet
whyItMatters: Holds passport + cards + cash. RFID shielding stops contactless skimming attacks at crowded stations.

name: Eagle Creek Silk Money Belt
whyItMatters: Worn under clothing for emergency cash, backup card, passport copy. If your main bag goes, you still get home.

name: Airalo eSIM (India tourist plan)
whyItMatters: Activate before landing — no airport SIM-counter scams, no ID-swap fraud, no waiting in a queue at 2am.

name: LifeStraw Go Filter Bottle
whyItMatters: Built-in filter purifies tap water. Saves ₹50/day on bottled water and eliminates the tampered-bottle risk.
